headlines.description: — With Aaron Rodgers approaching his MVP form and Green Bay’s defense correcting its red-zone problems, the Packers have reason to feel confident as they enter the toughest stretch of their schedule.
headlines.shortLinkText: Packers defeat Washington 24-10 for 6th straight victory

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at Tennessee Titans

headlines.description: — The Tennessee Titans wanted to start games faster and score more points early.
headlines.shortLinkText: Titans start fast, simply dominate Mahomes, Chiefs 27-3

headlines.description: — Matt Ryan fell asleep during Game 6 of the National League Championship Series, and wasn't even aware until waking up Sunday morning that the Atlanta Braves are heading to the World Series.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ryan throws for 336, Falcons get FG at end, top Miami 30-28

events.name: New York Jets at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — The Patriots walked off the field Sunday with the type of win that had eluded them. The Jets left with two losses, one that could further complicate an already frustrating year.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jones tosses 2 TDs, Patriots roll 54-13 as Jets lose Wilson

events.name: Carolina Panthers at New York Giants

headlines.description: — With most of his top skill players sidelined with injuries, Daniel Jones did a little of bit of everything for the New York Giants. He ran the ball, threw a touchdown pass and even made a great catch on a trick play.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jones passing and catching, Giants D spark win over Panthers

headlines.description: — Ja'Marr Chase caught Joe Burrow's pass over the middle, avoided two players diving at his legs and spun past another defender into the clear.
headlines.shortLinkText: Burrow, Chase lead way as Bengals speed past Ravens 41-17

events.name: Philadelphia Eagles at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — Las Vegas Raiders quarterback Derek Carr found inactive tight end Darren Waller on the sideline during Sunday’s game against the Philadelphia Eagles to let him know “how weird” it was not having his top target on the field.
headlines.shortLinkText: Raiders beat Philly, 33-22, in second game under Bisaccia

events.name: Detroit Lions at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — Jared Goff was under immediate pressure from Aaron Donald when he dropped back late in a one-score game. He threw to the end zone while being dropped, and <a...
headlines.shortLinkText: Stafford throws 3 TD passes, Rams edge Goff's Lions 28-19

headlines.description: — Tight end Zach Ertz has been with the Cardinals for just nine days and already has the longest touchdown catch of his nine-year career, rumbling 47 yards toward the end zone to put an exclamation point on Arizona's 31-5 win over the Houston Texans...
headlines.shortLinkText: Cardinals move to 7-0 for season, roll past Texans 31-5

events.name: Chicago Bears at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — Tom Brady says he's not one for collecting a lot of mementos documenting his many accomplishments during an unsurpassed 22-year career. Becoming the first player to throw 600 career touchdown passes is pretty special, though.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brady tops 600 career TD passes, Buccaneers rout Bears 38-3

headlines.description: — Colts coach Frank Reich wasn't about to make the same mistake twice.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wentz leads Colts to rain-soaked 30-18 win over 49ers
